caption: A man wearing a white kurta and a colorful orange, yellow, and green sash stands before a crowd during a political event. He raises his arms and gestures with his hands as he speaks, moving from a position of holding his hands near his head to lowering them slightly. Behind him, a crowd of people, some wearing red caps, look on. The scene is framed by a graphic overlay featuring the lotus logo of the Bharatiya Janata Party. On-screen text in Hindi reads "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस", and English text includes "लाइव एवं" and social media handles "@BJP4India" and "www.bjp.org/bjplive". Small text in the corners reads "प्रजानमंत्री" and "दिल्ली". The background consists of a repetitive pattern of the BJP lotus logo. Throughout the sequence, the man's gestures change while the surrounding crowd and graphic overlays remain static.
